## Summary

Describe the maintainer workflow or technical problem this change addresses.

## Verification

- [ ] npm run verify
- [ ] Fixture or packed-install evidence added when behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation updated when public behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] This change does not require secrets in tests
- [ ] This change does not checkout or execute untrusted pull request code from the Action
- [ ] Public docs and examples avoid private repository data
